data.body:
## Description
Write failing tests in tests/hooks/test-record-test-status.sh:
- test_stale_red_marker_partial_pass: Mock runner exits non-zero. Output shows a GREEN test failing AND a RED-zone test passing. Assert record-test-status.sh records failed with stale message naming the passing RED-zone test.
- test_passing_red_zone_detected_from_output: Mock runner exits non-zero. Output includes bash-style (test_name ... PASS) passing RED-zone tests. Assert record-test-status.sh detects via its observable stderr output (stale marker message), NOT by calling internal helper directly.
- test_red_tolerance_preserved_when_all_red_fail: Mock runner exits non-zero, all RED-zone tests fail. Assert record-test-status.sh records passed. Verifies no regression.

Each test invokes record-test-status.sh and asserts on exit code and stderr — behavioral tests, not structural.

## TDD Requirement
All three tests must exist and fail (RED).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] All three tests exist and fail (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_stale_red_marker_partial_pass.*FAIL'
